name: Safe synthetic playbook: Remediation execution reports patch failure
description: Post-remediation regression where orchestration validates that a defect remains on a patched asset—measurement mismatch or failed install scenario. Describes status codes and reschedule only—no exploit retest instructions.

simulated_timeline.synthetic_narrative: Change ticket LAB-CHG-8842 closes with success flag in orchestrator stub.
Compliance scanner simulation still observes vulnerable build marker on lab-app-batch-09.
Engineering reviews packaging error versus missed instance group.

payload.title: LAB: Patch verification failed — defect persists (synthetic)

events_emitted.headline: Remediation job reported unsuccessful validation
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Execution record carries synthetic status enums only.

events_emitted.headline: Reopened or escalated finding
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: SLA clock adjusted for renewed emergency priority (fixture).

expected_agents_triggered.triggered_reason_synthetic: Revalidation and advisory refresh after failed patch verification.
Persistent vulnerability keeps incident posture elevated.

expected_remediation.summary: Rebuild patch package targeting correct fleet slice, rerun validation scans, extend compensating monitoring until green (simulation).

expected_autonomous_remediation.synthetic_action: Automatically reopen CAB task with linkage to failed execution record.

expected_human_approval_gates.synthetic_rationale: Humans approve maintenance window variance after first attempt failed verification.

expected_final_report.title: Patch failure after remediation — synthetic playbook outcome
expected_final_report.synthetic_executive_summary: Post-change validation contradicted closure; playbook tracks reopening workflows and tightened verification gates without exploitation testing.
